items.title: Operations Declined: cancellation reason + Reports tile for declined top-load revenue
items.body: New "Operations Declined" cancellation reason, plus a Reports tile that totals the revenue passed on — gross, customer net, and carrier net of the best available load at decline time.

items.title: Disable expired backhaul requests (pickup window fully in the past)
items.body: Requests whose pickup window has fully passed are now marked Inactive and can't be run (no credits spent) — just edit the dates forward to re-enable them instantly.

items.title: Share load from detail view — Email / Text / Copy
items.body: Share any load by email or text straight from its detail view — the email includes full load details and a route map — or copy a ready-to-paste summary to your clipboard.

items.title: Add "Driver Needed Home By" date field to backhaul requests
items.body: Add a "Driver Needed Home By" date to your backhaul requests — it appears on search results and each load's details so dispatch always has the deadline in view.

items.title: Duplicate a fleet
items.body: Duplicate any fleet with one click — copies the full rate configuration (rates, fuel settings, equipment, charges) so you can stand up a similar fleet without re-entering setup.
